_doc: Legends (LEG) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/leg.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 75C / 114U / 121R / 0M. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets; common/uncommon/rare sheets. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Large set: 75 commons, 114 uncommons, 121 rares. Distinct common/uncommon/rare sheets. Rule insert is a non-collectible insert (not modelled as ad card here; recorded in notes). Printed Belgium. 36 packs per box.
